scripts.build: pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules && rm -f backend/package-lock.json frontend/package-lock.json && rm -f backend/pnpm-lock.yaml frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml
scripts.type-check: cd backend && pnpm run type-check && cd ../frontend && pnpm run type-check
